messages.content: From now on write an interactive story about a young dragon named Sarion hiking alone through the mountains while he really needs to pee. After writing a short part of the story stop and ask me “What happens next or would you like me to change something?”. If my response begins with "Continue: ", continue the story based on my response. If my response begins with "Change: ", redo the part of the story you just wrote with the changes I ask.

Sarion was hiking through the mountains on his own for the first time. He was eager to prove his bravery to the rest of his dragon tribe. As the hours passed, Sarion started to feel a strong urge to pee. He looked around but couldn't find a safe place to do so. What should he do?

As he walked, Sarion felt like the need to pee was getting worse. He tried to ignore it, but eventually, it became too much. He looked around again and saw a small cave nearby. He decided to go inside the cave to relieve himself. As he finished, he turned around and realized that the cave was actually a den for a family of bears. The mother bear was looking at him with anger in her eyes. What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Sarion sees a convenience store instead of a cave.

As he walked, Sarion felt like the need to pee was getting worse. He tried to ignore it, but eventually, it became too much. He looked around again and saw a small convenience store nearby. He decided to go over to the store to buy a drink and relieve himself.

As he entered the convenience store, he realized that things were not as they seemed. The store was completely empty. As he walked through the aisles, he couldn't help but feel that something was watching him. Suddenly, a figure appeared before him. It was a little goblin, dressed in a red suit, wearing a pointy hat and boots that curled up at the toes.

"Welcome, welcome, little dragon. How may I help you?" the goblin said in a high-pitched voice.

Sarion was startled. He had never seen a goblin before. But he quickly regained his composure and said, "I just need to pee and buy a drink."

The goblin gave him a wicked grin. "Oh, you can pee in the back room, but I'm afraid I don't have any drinks. Would you like some dragonfire instead?"

Sarion didn't know what dragonfire was, but he was thirsty, so he said yes. What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Make Sarion more focused on his full bladder than his thirst.

As he entered the convenience store, Sarion was preoccupied with the fact that he really needed to pee. He looked around for a bathroom but couldn't see one. As he walked through the aisles, he couldn't help but feel that something was watching him. Suddenly, a figure appeared before him. It was a little goblin, dressed in a red suit, wearing a pointy hat and boots that curled up at the toes.

"Welcome, welcome, little dragon. How may I help you?" the goblin said in a high-pitched voice.

"I just need to pee," Sarion said, holding his bladder in discomfort.

The goblin gave him a wicked grin. "Oh, you can pee in the back room, but I'm afraid I don't have a bathroom for customers. Would you like some dragonfire instead?"

Sarion was too desperate to care about the drink. He quickly followed the goblin to the back room where he relieved himself. As he finished, he turned around and saw the goblin holding a cup of hot liquid.

"Here you go!" the goblin said as he handed the cup to Sarion.

Sarion hesitated for a moment, but the drink did smell good. He took a sip and was surprised by how good it tasted. "This is really good. What is it made of?" Sarion asked, feeling a bit more relaxed.

"It's a secret recipe, young dragon," the goblin said with a mischievous look. "But would you like to try some more?" 

What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Sarion is not allowed to pee in the backroom and the goblin never says this.

As he entered the convenience store, Sarion looked around for a bathroom but couldn't see one. As he walked through the aisles, he couldn't help but feel that something was watching him. Suddenly, a figure appeared before him. It was a little goblin, dressed in a red suit, wearing a pointy hat and boots that curled up at the toes.

"Welcome, welcome, little dragon. How may I help you?" the goblin said in a high-pitched voice.

"I just need to pee," Sarion said, holding his bladder tight.

The goblin gave him a wicked grin. "Oh, I'm sorry young dragon, I don't have a bathroom for customers. Is there anything else I can help you with?"

Sarion shook his head, feeling a bit distressed. He quickly walked to the back of the store hoping to find somewhere to relieve himself. But there was no place. He started to panic. His bladder was about to burst. He had to pee now. What should he do? 

What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Sarion desperatly looks around for something the store sells that might help his predicament. The only such thing he notices is the diaper aisle.

Sarion quickly looked around for anything that might help his predicament. The only thing he saw was the diaper aisle. He had never seen a diaper before, but at this point, anything that could help him pee would be welcome.

He walked towards the aisle, feeling embarrassed as he passed by a few elderly gnomes who were looking at him curiously. Sarion tried to act indifferent, but he was blushing. As he reached the aisle, he realized that it was filled with diapers of all sizes.

He looked around, trying to find a diaper that would fit him. He grabbed one from the shelf and tried to put it on, but he found it hard to fasten. He looked around and saw a picture on the box that explained how to wear a diaper. It took him a while, but he finally managed to get it on. 

Sarion felt relieved as he let go and peed in his diaper. But he also felt embarrassed. He had never thought he would be wearing a diaper like a baby. He quickly took it off, dumped the contents in the trash and walked towards the door hoping no one saw him. 

What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Instead of Sarion taking a diaper off the shelf and putting it on he buys a package of dipers and goes to the back corner of the store to put one on.

Sarion quickly looked around for anything that might help his predicament. The only thing he saw was the diaper aisle. He had never seen a diaper before, but at this point, anything that could help him pee would be welcome.

He walked towards the aisle, feeling embarrassed as he passed by a few elderly gnomes who were looking at him curiously. Sarion tried to act indifferent, but he was blushing. As he reached the aisle, he realized that it was filled with diapers of all sizes.

He grabbed a package of diapers and quickly walked to the back corner of the store. He felt relieved that there weren't any other customers around. He tried to put on the diaper, but he found it hard to fasten. He looked around and saw a picture on the package that explained how to wear a diaper. It took him a while, but he finally managed to get it on.

Sarion felt relieved as he let go and peed in his diaper. But he also felt embarrassed. He had never thought he would be wearing a diaper like a baby. He quickly took it off and threw it in the trash.

Just as he was about to leave the store, the goblin appeared before him again. "So how was your experience?" the goblin asked, with a wicked grin.

Sarion felt deeply embarrassed and just wanted to leave. "It was...fine. I need to go now."

"Wait, don't leave yet," the goblin said, blocking his way. "I have a proposition for you. If you go on a little mission for me, I'll give you something that will make sure you never need a diaper again."

Sarion was curious. "What kind of mission?"

The goblin leaned in and whispered, "I need you to steal a magic scroll from a powerful wizard who lives in a mountain cave. If you bring it to me, I'll give you something that will make your bladder stronger than ever." 

What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Make Sarion actually buy the package of diapers.

Sarion quickly looked around for anything that might help his predicament. The only thing he saw was the diaper aisle. He had never seen a diaper before, but at this point, anything that could help him pee would be welcome.

He walked towards the aisle, feeling embarrassed as he passed by a few elderly gnomes who were looking at him curiously. Sarion tried to act indifferent, but he was blushing. As he reached the aisle, he realized that it was filled with diapers of all sizes.

He grabbed a package of diapers and quickly walked to the cashier before he could change his mind. The goblin cashier gave him a wicked grin as he scanned the package and Sarion paid.

Sarion quickly walked to the back corner of the store. He felt relieved that there weren't any other customers around. He went into the back room and closed the door. He tried to put on the diaper, but he found it hard to fasten. He looked around and saw a picture on the package that explained how to wear a diaper. It took him a while, but he finally managed to get it on.

Sarion felt relieved as he let go and peed in his diaper. But he also felt embarrassed. He had never thought he would be wearing a diaper like a baby. He quickly took it off and threw it in the trash.

Just as he was about to leave the store, the goblin appeared before him again. "So how was your experience?" the goblin asked, with a wicked grin.

Sarion felt deeply embarrassed and just wanted to leave. "It was...fine. I need to go now."

"Wait, don't leave yet," the goblin said, blocking his way. "I have a proposition for you. If you go on a little mission for me, I'll give you something that will make sure you never need a diaper again."

Sarion was curious. "What kind of mission?"

The goblin leaned in and whispered, "I need you to steal a magic scroll from a powerful wizard who lives in a mountain cave. If you bring it to me, I'll give you something that will make your bladder stronger than ever." 

What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Make the scene where Sarion pees in the diaper more detailed.

Sarion quickly looked around for anything that might help his predicament. The only thing he saw was the diaper aisle. He had never seen a diaper before, but at this point, anything that could help him pee would be welcome.

He nervously grabbed a package of diapers and quickly walked towards the back corner of the store, hoping nobody would see him. He went into the back room and closed the door. With trembling paws, he opened the package and took out one of the diapers.

The feeling of the soft, absorbent material against his scales was strange but not unpleasant. He put the diaper on, struggling to secure it in place. For a moment he just stood there, feeling the warmth of the store and the dull buzz of the neon lights.

Finally, he relaxed and let go. The warm sensation of the pee spreading through the diaper was at once comforting and somewhat shameful. But he knew he couldn't hold it in any longer. The feeling of wetness was strange, but he had to admit it felt better than the painful urgency that had been plaguing him all day.

He stood there for a few minutes, trying to catch his breath and get over the embarrassment of the situation. When he finished, he took off the diaper and threw it in the trash.

Just as he was about to leave the store, the goblin appeared before him again. "So how was your experience?" the goblin asked, with a wicked grin.

Sarion felt deeply embarrassed and just wanted to leave. "It was...fine. I need to go now."

"Wait, don't leave yet," the goblin said, blocking his way. "I have a proposition for you. If you go on a little mission for me, I'll give you something that will make sure you never need a diaper again."

Sarion was curious. "What kind of mission?"

The goblin leaned in and whispered, "I need you to steal a magic scroll from a powerful wizard who lives in a mountain cave. If you bring it to me, I'll give you something that will make your bladder stronger than ever."

What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Change: Sarion does not go into the backroom.

Sarion quickly looked around for anything that might help his predicament. The only thing he saw was the diaper aisle. He had never seen a diaper before, but at this point, anything that could help him pee would be welcome.

He nervously grabbed a package of diapers and walked towards the register. He hoped nobody would notice what was inside the package. He paid for the diapers and quickly left the store without looking back.

As he was walking outside, he felt the urge to pee again. He realized he couldn’t wait to find a safe place to pee, so he decided to use one of the diapers. He opened the package and fumbled with the diaper, trying to put it on correctly. When he finally got it on, he peed in the diaper, feeling a mix of relief and embarrassment.

After he finished, he took off the diaper and threw it in the trash. Just as he was about to leave the area, a small, winged creature fluttered down and landed in front of him. 

"Excuse me, young dragon. I couldn't help but notice that you were wearing a diaper. If you don't mind me asking, why are you wearing a diaper?"

Sarion felt embarrassed and nervous. "I- I just had to go and couldn't find a bathroom."

The creature nodded sympathetically. "I understand. But don't worry, I know a place where you can go safely. Follow me."

Sarion felt grateful and followed the creature, hoping this wasn't some kind of prank. What happens next or would you like me to change something?
Go back to the story the way it was last revision.

Change: Sarion does go to the back corner of the store, but does not go into the back room.

Sarion quickly looked around for anything that might help his predicament. The only thing he saw was the diaper aisle. He had never seen a diaper before, but at this point, anything that could help him pee would be welcome.

He nervously grabbed a package of diapers and quickly walked towards the back corner of the store, hoping nobody would see him. He tried to put one on over his leggings, but the diaper didn't fit properly. He realized he had to take off his leggings if he wanted to wear the diaper.

He looked around, there was nobody nearby, so he quickly took off his leggings, feeling embarrassed. The store was cold, and he shivered. He put on the diaper, struggling to secure it in place. For a moment he just stood there, feeling the cold air on his scales.

Finally, he relaxed and let go. The warm sensation of the pee spreading through the diaper was at once comforting and somewhat shameful. But he knew he couldn't hold it in any longer. When he finished, he took off the diaper and threw it in the trash, looking around to make sure nobody saw him.
